control_layers.name: Bulk Water Control
control_layers.description: Primary barrier against liquid water ingress from rain, snowmelt, and standing water.

control_layers.name: Capillary Control
control_layers.description: Resistance to moisture migration through porous materials via capillary action.

control_layers.name: Air Control
control_layers.description: Continuous barrier limiting uncontrolled air movement through the building enclosure.

control_layers.name: Vapor Control
control_layers.description: Layer managing vapor diffusion to prevent interstitial condensation.

control_layers.name: Thermal Control
control_layers.description: Insulation layer managing heat flow through the building enclosure.

control_layers.name: Fire and Smoke Control
control_layers.description: Barriers and rated assemblies limiting fire spread and smoke migration.

control_layers.name: Movement Control
control_layers.description: Joints, fastening patterns, and details accommodating thermal, structural, and seismic movement.

control_layers.name: Weathering Surface
control_layers.description: Outermost exposed layer that resists UV, wind, precipitation, and environmental degradation.

control_layers.name: Drainage Plane
control_layers.description: Dedicated layer or surface directing incidental moisture downward and outward.

control_layers.name: Protection Layer
control_layers.description: Layer shielding underlying control layers from mechanical damage, backfill pressure, or traffic.

control_layers.name: Vegetation Support Layer
control_layers.description: Substrate and root-barrier system supporting vegetated roof or wall assemblies.
